name: ILLIT
description: ILLIT is the five-member Korean-Japanese girl group under Belift Lab (HYBE), known for their soft pastel aesthetic, viral dance challenges, and a fresh take on Y2K K-Pop.

funFacts: Known for soft, steady stage presence
members.bio: Yunah is ILLIT's Korean leader. Her steady presence and warm vocals anchor the group's signature soft sound.

funFacts: Korean — known for her doll-like visuals
Often viral on Korean SNS for her looks
members.bio: Minju is ILLIT's Korean visual whose doll-like aesthetic defines the group's soft Y2K image and consistently trends on Korean SNS.
Moka is ILLIT's Japanese member whose cheerful energy and bilingual charm have built a strong base in the Japanese K-Pop market.

funFacts: Korean — among the tallest in ILLIT
Praised for her elegant stage presence
members.bio: Wonhee is ILLIT's Korean dance lead with model-like proportions. Her elegant stage presence balances the group's softer aesthetic.

funFacts: Known for her aegyo and stage cuteness
members.bio: Iroha is ILLIT's Japanese maknae whose bunny-like cute energy embodies the group's soft Y2K identity for the Japanese fandom.

seo.title: ILLIT Name Generator | Get Your Korean Name with GLLIT
seo.description: Create your ILLIT Korean name with Yunah, Minju, Moka, Wonhee & Iroha! Instant chemistry scores for Belift Lab's hottest 4th-gen girl group. Perfect for GLLIT fanfiction.
